column1: Wearables corroborate patterns; they do not diagnose pain.
Kubios z-axis dynamic acceleration is a vertical-impact proxy, not calibrated anatomical force.
Kubios bus/van/sedan sample sizes are limited and should be presented as corroborative.
RRI-derived HR is preferred over raw ECG approximate HR where artifacts may exist.
WHOOP provides broad physiological context, not precise vehicle-mode accelerometry.
Commuting is a contextual cohort associated with the historical taxi/sedan accommodation period; it does not prove a particular vehicle assignment.
Strava provides functional distance context, not ParaTransit vehicle-type burden.
Cohort definitions must remain fixed for a filed snapshot.
